title: 🏷️ MOTOR SHOW
data_structure:
\[
  {
    "name": "name",
    "mandatory": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "2017 IAA Frankfurt"
  },
  {
    "name": "date\_from",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "2017-09-14"
  },
  {
    "name": "date\_until",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "2017-09-24"
  },
  {
    "name": "location",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "Frankfurt"
  },
  {
    "name": "target\_audience",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "international"
  },
  {
    "name": "focus",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "new cars"
  }
]
